title: Avoid empty code blocks
description: Empty code blocks create ambiguity about whether they are intentional placeholders or incomplete implementations. This confusion can mislead maintainers and hide potential bugs or unfinished code.
recommendation: Remove empty blocks or add meaningful implementation and comments explaining the intention.

noncompliant.description: Empty code blocks create ambiguity about whether they are intentional or represent incomplete implementation.

compliant.description: Add meaningful implementation or clear comments explaining intentional empty behavior.

checks.message: Empty code block detected: Add meaningful implementation or remove the block. If intentionally empty, add explanatory comments.
